prompt: Reformat this JSON blob with consistent 2-space indentation and sorted keys. It's valid JSON, just ugly.
Convert these timestamps from Unix epoch to ISO 8601 format. There are about 20 of them in a text file. Quick conversion, nothing fancy.
Generate a quick ASCII table from this CSV data so I can paste it into a Slack message. Just 5 columns and 10 rows.
Strip all the HTML tags from this email template and give me just the plain text content. I need it for the text/plain alternative.
Convert this list of RGB hex color codes (#FF5733, #33FF57, etc.) into their RGB decimal equivalents. Just a quick lookup table.
Add line numbers to this code snippet so I can reference specific lines in a code review comment. Just prefix each line with its number.
Sort this list of 30 package dependencies alphabetically. They're just names in a text file, one per line. Quick sort, nothing structural.
Convert this markdown table into a CSV file. The table has headers and 15 rows. Straightforward extraction.
URL-encode these 10 query parameter values so I can construct a valid URL. Some have spaces and special characters.
Generate a UUID v4 and format it as a lowercase hyphenated string. I just need one for a test fixture.
